message:
🐛 Fix Provider Health demo badge and add Settings link (#310)

- Remove provider_health from DEMO_DATA_CARDS — the card uses real
  data from /settings/keys and useClusters(), only falling back to
  demo data when getDemoMode() is true (handled inside the hook)
- Add a Settings gear icon button for unconfigured AI providers that
  navigates to /settings to configure API keys
- Add "Configure AI keys" link in the empty state

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
